windows.command: $ErrorActionPreference='Stop'; & cmd /c '"C:\Users\i4studio\esp\v5.4.1\esp-idf\export.bat" && idf.py build'; if ($LASTEXITCODE -ne 0) { exit $LASTEXITCODE }; Write-Host ''; Write-Host '========== COVERAGE OUTPUT ==========' -ForegroundColor Cyan; if (Test-Path 'tests/build/coverage_html/index.html') { Write-Host 'HTML report: tests/build/coverage_html/index.html' -ForegroundColor Green } else { Write-Host 'HTML report not found at tests/build/coverage_html/index.html' -ForegroundColor Yellow }; if (Test-Path 'tests/build/coverage.xml') { Write-Host 'Cobertura XML: tests/build/coverage.xml' -ForegroundColor Green } else { Write-Host 'Cobertura XML not found at tests/build/coverage.xml' -ForegroundColor Yellow }

linux.command: . $IDF_PATH/export.sh > /dev/null 2>&1 && idf.py build; echo ''; echo '========== COVERAGE OUTPUT =========='; [ -f tests/build/coverage_html/index.html ] && echo 'HTML report: tests/build/coverage_html/index.html' || echo 'HTML report not found at tests/build/coverage_html/index.html'; [ -f tests/build/coverage.xml ] && echo 'Cobertura XML: tests/build/coverage.xml' || echo 'Cobertura XML not found at tests/build/coverage.xml'
